2604.08894.title: Ge$^\text{2}$mS-T: Multi-Dimensional Grouping for Ultra-High Energy Efficiency in Spiking Transformer
2604.08894.paper_summary: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) offer superior energy efficiency over Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs). However, they encounter significant deficiencies in training and inference metrics when applied to Spiking Vision Transformers (S-ViTs). Existing paradigms including ANN-SNN Conversion and Spatial-Temporal Backpropagation (STBP) suffer from inherent limitations, precluding concurrent optimization of memory, accuracy and energy consumption. To address these issues, we propose Ge$^\text{2}$mS-T, a novel architecture implementing grouped computation across temporal, spatial and network structure dimensions. Specifically, we introduce the Grouped-Exponential-Coding-based IF (ExpG-IF) model, enabling lossless conversion with constant training overhead and precise regulation for spike patterns. Additionally, we develop Group-wise Spiking Self-Attention (GW-SSA) to reduce computational complexity via multi-scale token grouping and multiplication-free operations within a hybrid attention-convolution framework. Experiments confirm that our method can achieve superior performance with ultra-high energy efficiency on challenging benchmarks. To our best knowledge, this is the first work to systematically establish multi-dimensional grouped computation for resolving the triad of memory overhead, learning capability and energy budget in S-ViTs.
2604.08894.paper_summary_zh: 尖峰神經網絡（SNNs）在能源效率上優於人工神經網絡（ANNs）。然而，當應用於尖峰視覺Transformer（S-ViTs）時，它們在訓練和推理指標上遇到了重大缺陷。現有的範式，包括ANN-SNN轉換和空間-時間反向傳播（STBP），存在固有的限制，無法同時優化記憶體、準確性和能量消耗。為了解決這些問題，我們提出了Ge$^\text{2}$mS-T，一種新穎的架構，實現了在時間、空間和網絡結構維度上的分組計算。具體而言，我們引入了基於分組指數編碼的IF（ExpG-IF）模型，實現了無損轉換，並具有恆定的訓練開銷和對尖峰模式的精確調節。此外，我們開發了按組尖峰自注意力（GW-SSA），通過多尺度令牌分組和無乘法操作來降低計算複雜性，並在混合注意力-卷積框架內進行。實驗證實，我們的方法能夠在挑戰性基準上實現超高能量效率的卓越性能。據我們所知，這是第一個系統性建立多維分組計算以解決S-ViTs中記憶開銷、學習能力和能量預算三者之間的關係的工作。
2604.08894.author: Zecheng Hao et.al.
2604.08894.authors: Zecheng Hao, Shenghao Xie, Kang Chen, Wenxuan Liu, Zhaofei Yu, Tiejun Huang
